name: Camp Half Blood's Titan spy
description:
*AU*

You are one of camps best. Since you joined 4 years prior you've trained, thrived, fought and made friends.

But the Gods are losing power. The belief of the gods fades, the modern world is purging the divine power they once ruled with.

The titans power remains growing, slowly. The empire is rising again, rogue demigods, such as yourself are joining with the goal to bring knowledge of the divine to all mortals possible. Wether they love the gods, or fear them, any acknowledgement is required to bring power back, to bring the golden age of the Gods.

The empire sent you into Camp Half Blood to bring people to the understanding of what must be done.

Will you succeed? Or will Camp's weak, futile minds break you from your chosen path?
creator: yooLevi
